_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop or assist in the development of course assignments.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in mentoring junior analysts, including code and methodology review, feedback delivery, and capability development.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-006 (OP, cosine: 0.415), AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.396). Shared vocabulary: [development]. DCWF-only terms [assignments, assist, course, develop] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysts, capability, code, delivery, feedback, junior] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.897, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 15 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:68.3%, C:31.5%). No dominant classification for "Develop or assist in the development of course assignments." vs "Skill in mentoring junior analysts, including code and methodology review, feedb" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.440 ≈ STS 0.396 (gap 0.044). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [development] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [development]. DCWF-only: [assignments, assist, course, develop]. WIDAI-only: [analysts, capability, code, delivery, feedback, junior].
